other_findings.finding: POSTN+ basal cells differentiate along two paths: ORS/CL trajectory and IRS trajectory
AGR2 loss promotes cell migration in POSTN+ basal cells, may be involved in placode specification

evidence_quotes.quote: Inferred trajectory and pseudotime analysis of epidermal cells in the integrated prenatal skin and SkO data predicted the differentiation of POSTN + basal cells into two paths: ORS/CL trajectory, comprising DPYSL2 + basal cells, ORS and CL; and IRS trajectory, involving placode, matrix, cuticle/cortex and IRS
increased cellular migration in POSTN + basal cells may be involved in placode specification and dermal invagination
